resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def trailingZeroes(self, n: int) -> int:
        count = 0
        i = 5
        while i <= n:
            count += n // i
            i *= 5
        return count
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Count the number of factors of 5 in n!, as each factor contributes one trailing zero.
